book.autoSearchNoCandidates: No cover candidates were found for this ISBN.
book.progressPromptMessage: Set the reading progress for "{title}" to 100%?

import.sourceSkipped: Google Books skipped (no API key configured)

scanner.title: Scan ISBN Barcode
scanner.help: Point your camera at a book barcode. The search starts automatically after a valid ISBN is found.
scanner.startError: Unable to start barcode scanner. Check camera permissions.

coverPicker.urlInvalid: Could not load cover from URL. Please verify the link.

toasts.newVersion: A new version ({version}) is available. Reload for updates.

settings.title: Settings
settings.timezoneHelp: Display dates and times in your local timezone.
settings.timezoneInvalid: Please select a valid timezone from the list.
settings.apiDocsHelp: Explore and test backend endpoints directly from the app.
settings.apiDocsOpenNewTab: Open API docs in a new tab

started.title: Start date already set
started.message: Date started is already set. Do you want to keep {oldDate} or set {newDate} as the new date started?

finished.title: Finish date already set
finished.message: Date finished is already set. Do you want to keep {oldDate} or set {newDate} as the new date finished?

startedAfterFinished.title: Book was already finished
startedAfterFinished.message: This book was finished on {finishedDate}. What should we do?
startedAfterFinished.keepDesc: Keeps the finish date ({finishedDate}) and does not set a start date.
startedAfterFinished.clearDesc: Removes the finish date and sets today ({newStartDate}) as the start date.

auth.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordComplexityError: Password does not meet complexity requirements

user.newKeyShownOnce: Copy this key now. It is shown only once

admin.title: Administration
admin.deleteConfirmTitle: Do you really want to delete this user?
admin.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own admin role.
admin.selfDeleteHint: To delete your own account, use Profile > Danger Zone.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Download a complete backup of your library including all books, covers, and data.

restore.title: Restore
restore.description: Restore your library from a previous backup file.
restore.warning: Warning: Restoring will replace ALL current data. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.
restore.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? This will replace all current data and cannot be undone.
restore.confirmWarning: This action is irreversible. All current data will be lost.

error.isbnAlreadyExists: This ISBN is already used by another book.
error.dateInFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
error.dateStartedAfterFinished: Start date cannot be after finish date.
error.dateFinishedRequiredForRead: A finished book must have an end date. Change the status if you want to remove the finish date.
error.invalidLanguageCode: Language must be a 2-letter ISO code (for example: EN, DE, FR).
error.cannotDeleteLastAdmin: Cannot delete account: you are the last administrator
error.cannotDeleteOwnAccountHere: You cannot delete your own account here. Use Profile > Danger Zone.
error.importMalformedEvent: Received malformed server event during import.
error.importUnsupportedContentType: Unsupported upload content type. Use CSV or JSON files.
error.importTempFileCreateFailed: Could not create a temporary import file. Please try again.
error.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Please try a smaller file or check server limits.

oidc.notLinked: Your account is not linked yet.

dataManagement.title: Manage my data
dataManagement.description: Export your library or import books from a CSV/JSON file.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Irreversible actions that permanently delete your data or account.

resetData.title: Reset All Personal Data
resetData.description: Delete all your books, tags, and reading progress while keeping your account and settings.
resetData.hint: Type exactly: DELETE ALL MY DATA
resetData.success: Deleted {books} books, {tags} tags, and {entries} progress entries.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all associated data permanently.
deleteAccount.warning: This is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.lastAdminError: Cannot delete account: you are the last administrator

timeline.title: Reading Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A chronological view of books you've finished reading
timeline.noReadBooks: No finished books in your library yet.

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Import and export your personal library data

export.title: Export
export.description: Choose datasets and format, then download a ZIP archive.

import.title: Import
import.description: Upload one CSV or JSON file, map fields, validate, then import.
import.noSavedMappings: No saved mappings yet. Save your current mapping to reuse it later.
import.createProgressForRead: Create 100% progress entry for books imported as 'Read'
import.previewNoMappedFields: No mapped fields yet. Assign source fields to target fields to preview values.
import.mappingMissingFields: Loaded mapping has {count} missing source fields.
import.confirmDestructive: This writes data to your library and cannot be auto-undone.
